title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2025-14, dated October 10, 2025, entitled, "Resolution approving the 20% Municipal Development Fund of the Municipal Government of Los Baños amounting to Eighty-Eight Million Eight Hundred Ninety-Seven Thousand One Hundred Ninety-Five Pesos and 40/100 (Php 88,897,195.40) for FY 2026."
